title: Foundations
description: Long before UNDS became a familiar name on national and international stages, the University of Nigeria had already built a reputation for producing exceptional thinkers, advocates, and public leaders. Somewhere in the 1990s, that tradition found a home in the University of Nigeria Debating Society. Although much of this early history survives only through the memories of alumni, the Society quietly nurtured generations of speakers, writers, and critical thinkers, laying the foundation for everything that would follow.
caption: Every lasting tradition begins with people who choose to speak.

title: Resurgence
description: After a period of dormancy, UNDS found new life in 2018 when a coalition of students from both the Nsukka and Enugu campuses revived the Society with the support of the Students' Affairs Unit. The years that followed were spent rebuilding—not just membership, but culture. Internal training returned, members once again represented the university at national tournaments, and by 2020 the Society was confident enough to host the 8th Nigerian Debate Championship. That momentum soon crossed borders. In 2021, UNDS represented Nigeria at tournaments across Africa and Asia, becoming the only African team to break at UET IV while also competing at Covenant University Invitational and PAUDC, announcing to the wider debating community that UNDS was back.
caption: From rebuilding at home to making history abroad.
highlights: International debut across Africa and Asia
Only African team to break at UET IV

title: Rise to Prominence
description: With its foundations restored, UNDS entered its most decorated era. The Society evolved from simply attending tournaments to consistently shaping them. Across 2022 and 2023, members reached finals, won speaker and adjudicator awards, represented Nigeria at WUDC, and steadily established UNDS as one of the country's strongest debating institutions. The defining moment came at ANUDC 2023, where UNDS emerged champions of both the Open and Novice categories while collecting multiple individual honours. By 2024, the Society had earned a reputation not merely for winning tournaments, but for producing exceptional speakers, judges, and trainers across every level of competition.
caption: Excellence became the expectation—not the exception.

title: The Next Chapter
description: Today, UNDS continues to build on decades of tradition while looking firmly toward the future. New members continue to distinguish themselves on the national circuit, collecting medals in debating, adjudication, and public speaking, while the Society expands its reach through training programmes, campus tournaments, and community initiatives. Every generation inherits the legacy of those before it—and leaves the Society stronger for those who come next. The next milestone is still being written.
caption: The next milestone might have your name on it.
